summary: The changed flow metadata proof now waits on the existing turn_final websocket boundary instead of sleeping for a fixed delay.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/integration/flows.turn-metadata.test.ts --test-name "top-level flow markdown persists runtime lookupSummary metadata"
targeted_proof.notes: Focused server-unit proof passed with tests run: 1, passed: 1, failed: 0 after replacing the fixed delay with the websocket turn_final event boundary already used elsewhere in the file.
